problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optogenetic. Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
